news.t: Pacer ETFs Kicks Off 2026 with Launch of Two New Quality Free Cash Flow-Focused ETFs, One International Growth Fund, and the Expansion of the Sales Management Team

holdings.infoBox: QFRD is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Datadog stock at 5.91%, Advanced Micro Devices at 4.04%, Cadence Design Systems at 3.98%, CrowdStrike Holdings at 3.55%, and Synopsys at 3.20%.

overview.description: The Pacer S&P 500 Quality FCF R&D Leaders (QFRD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Quality FCF R&D Leaders index. The fund is passive, tracking an index of 50 large-cap US companies with high research and development spending, cash generation, and capital efficiency. The fund excludes securities from the real estate and financial sectors. QFRD was launched on Jan 12, 2026 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: S&P 500 Quality FCF R&D Leaders Index

data.title: Pacer ETFs Kicks Off 2026 with Launch of Two New Quality Free Cash Flow-Focused ETFs, One International Growth Fund, and the Expansion of the Sales Management Team
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $PIEL #ETF--Pacer ETFs kicks off 2026 with new free cash flow ETFs, international growth fund, after year of continued growth in 2025.
